title: Sanctuary policies prohibited
doc_html:
§82. Sanctuary policies prohibited

            A state entity, law enforcement agency, or local governmental entity may not adopt or have in effect a sanctuary policy.

            Acts 2024, No. 314, §1, eff. May 28, 2024.
doc_text:
§82.  Sanctuary policies prohibited
A state entity, law enforcement agency, or local governmental entity may not
adopt or have in effect a sanctuary policy.
Acts 2024, No. 314, §1, eff. May 28, 2024.
